question: In the context of the Bi et al. 2023 paper on Pangu-Weather, what type of entity is Pangu-Weather identified as according to the data availability section?

options.A: Pangu-Weather is identified as a novel type of predictive model.
options.B: Pangu-Weather is identified as an advanced statistical analysis software.
options.C: Pangu-Weather is identified as a comprehensive climate simulation tool.
options.D: Pangu-Weather is identified as a standard meteorological dataset.

explanation: Following the knowledge graph path, Pangu-Weather is proposed in BiEtAl2023 and is related back to itself as a type of 'Model'. Thus, it is identified as a novel type of predictive model.
